task_list.task: Port lib layer verbatim from docs/atm-415/ui/marginalia/lib/
files: lib/packs.ts (6 synthetic packs with variant pricing, all public-safe)

task_list.task: Port app pages verbatim from docs/atm-415/ui/marginalia/app/
task_list.done_when: All routes present; Next.js can resolve all imports

commands: cd apps/sticker-storefront && npm run test  # tsc --noEmit
task_list.done_when: Both commands exit 0, zero type errors, zero build errors

task_list.task: Manual golden-path verification via dev server
flow: / → catalog renders, hero copy matches locked baseline, packs visible
/packs/field-notes-botanical → variant selector, true-size badge, Add pack CTA
Add pack → cart count increments in header
/cart → line items render, variant labels correct, shipping calc correct
/checkout → PaymentForm renders; submit with valid card → /orders/[id]
/orders/[id] → confirmation, 'Your pack is on the way.'
/orders/[id]/status → FulfillmentStatus at 'ordered'; advance demo button works
Empty cart (/cart with no items) → EmptyState renders
task_list.done_when: All flows work, zero console errors, no unhandled exceptions
File exists; every hand-edit vs tool-driven action recorded

acceptance_criteria.criterion: npm run build exits 0 with 0 TypeScript errors
node tools/validate-contracts.mjs PASS (public-safe scan green, 0 failures)
Variant selector renders size/finish/sheet options for all 6 packs; pricing updates on selection
Cart: add, remove, quantity change, multi-line, shipping threshold ($30 free) all work
Checkout: valid card → order confirmation → status tracker renders; card ending 0002 → decline error
Fulfillment: ordered → packed → shipped → delivered state machine advances; cancel allowed before shipped, blocked after
Empty states: empty cart, empty catalog, unknown pack ID, unknown order ID all show correct EmptyState
Hero copy on / matches locked baseline exactly: 'A few sticker packs worth the page. Not ten thousand you'll scroll past.'
Artist credit visible on every PackCard and pack detail page
INTERVENTION_LEDGER.md committed with all hand-edits recorded

dependencies.dep: Scaffold files (package.json, next.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json, postcss.config.js) already written in step 0
packages/commerce-core engine and tools/ already frozen (ATM-416)
docs/atm-415/ui/marginalia — provided UI tree available at this path; port is verbatim
No external credentials, APIs, or payments required — all synthetic/localStorage

proof_surface.claim_boundary: Proves the app builds, TypeScript compiles, contracts pass, and all flows are manually verified on localhost. Does NOT claim: real payment processing, real physical fulfillment, real sticker buyer behavior, production deployment.

approval_gates_in_plan.trigger: Any change to frozen contracts/schemas/seeds/KPI after baseline — stop and surface
If CartLine schema cannot represent variant tuple (size × finish × sheet count) without schema change

hard_gates.evidence: 4 verification commands named (typecheck, build, contracts, dev); golden-path manual flow in T7

task_granularity.evidence: 8 tasks, each scoped to a single executable action (install, port lib, port components, port pages, build+typecheck, contracts, manual verify, ledger). Each has a single 'done_when' condition.

path_specificity.evidence: Every task names specific file paths and exact CLI commands. UI source path (docs/atm-415/ui/marginalia/) and destination paths (apps/sticker-storefront/lib/, components/, app/) are explicit.

dependency_awareness.evidence: Task dependencies chained (T2→T3→T4→T5→T6). External dependencies listed (D1–D5). No external credentials required. Approval gates named.

proof_quality.evidence: Proof surface targets engineering-eval-result.json after manual golden-path pass. Claim boundary explicitly excludes real payment, real fulfillment, production deployment. Cannot overclaim.

next: advance to engineering stage — execute T1–T8
